Author: ssalazar217 (SteSE)
Name: EchoXIV
Description:
EchoXIV is a chat translation tool for FFXIV. It translates both incoming and outgoing chat messages so you can communicate more naturally with players who use other languages.
Key Features:
- Bidirectional chat translation for incoming and outgoing messages.
- Configurable reading and writing languages.
- Smart failover with automatic switching between Papago and Google.
- Integrated Dalamud chat window for translated messages.

[Español]
EchoXIV es una herramienta de traducción de chat para FFXIV. Traduce mensajes entrantes y salientes para que puedas comunicarte de forma más natural con jugadores que usan otros idiomas.
Características:
- Traducción bidireccional para mensajes entrantes y salientes.
- Idiomas de lectura y escritura configurables.
- Failover inteligente con cambio automático entre Papago y Google.
- Ventana integrada de Dalamud para mensajes traducidos.
Punchline: Bidirectional chat translation in Dalamud with auto-failover. / Traducción bidireccional de chat en Dalamud con failover automático.
Changelog:
v0.1.0.32: removed the unused automatic translation checkbox from settings, keeping the UI aligned with the current explicit /tl workflow and incoming translation controls.
v0.1.0.31: completed all localized resource sets, repaired damaged RESX files, and prepared synchronized debug/release outputs for local testing and experimental Git downloads.
v0.1.0.30: UI language/defaults cleanup, WPF removal finalization, hook/API alignment, and localization consistency updates.
v0.1.0.29: Nueva versión estable para distribución vía Dalamud.
v0.1.0.25: Fix command message display
- Fixed an issue where explicit translated messages (/tl) were accidentally filtered out when 'Show Outgoing Messages' was disabled or evaluated incorrectly.
